$comment: Hand-authored fixture for docs/android-contracts/ledger.md. Ledger has no per-widget data table of its own (every widget aggregates the Library/Title-detail/Episode-tracking fixtures already in this directory) — the only new wire shape is the user_prefs row that persists the widget layout. Not exported from a live database.

malformed_example.$comment: A legacy/corrupt payload normalizeLedgerWidgets() must sanitize on read — Android's parser must degrade identically: drop the unknown panel, backfill the invalid width to a valid default, drop the unrecognized settings key, and clamp topN/title.
